summary: Shipped planning artifact consolidation into work-log/planning/, fixed plan:gate CLI parsing (plan-id no longer defaults to node.exe), added agent:push with Cursor beforeShellExecution hook to require paired dev logs before agent git push, fixed starter-template dev-log generator null crashes, and added npm run smoke:gates. Commit 6284b77 on main; smoke:gates passes. Tests skipped for this log (--no-tests).

recentCommits: 6284b77 feat: consolidate planning artifacts and enforce agent push dev logs
cd2d6e4 feat: postinstall message linking to GitHub and npm
b938fd7 license: switch to MIT and release v2.3.2
37e9768 release: v2.3.1 npm README and package metadata
3797ab3 docs: add 2.3.0 release notes to README and CHANGELOG

narrative: Moved planning study logs, design, and plan packages from work-log/study-docs/ to work-log/planning/
Fixed plan-gate and plan-finalize --plan-id parsing when flag omitted (was reading process.argv[0])
Added agent:push, check-dev-log-for-head, Cursor hooks.json, and agent-push-dev-log rule
Fixed dev-log-human-format for starter template without pipeline/prompt registries
Added smoke:gates script covering planning gate and agent push gate

decisions.decision: Consolidate all planningPhase markdown under work-log/planning/
decisions.rationale: Single folder for study logs, plan packages, and finalize manifests matches user expectation
alternativesRejected: Keep study-docs/ for markdown and planning/ for JSON only
decisions.tradeoff: Existing repos must move files and re-run plan:finalize

decisions.decision: Enforce dev logs only for agent shell push via Cursor hook, not terminal push
decisions.rationale: User wants freedom for manual pushes but mandatory audit when Cursor agent pushes
alternativesRejected: Git pre-push hook blocking all pushes
decisions.tradeoff: Cursor UI Push button bypasses beforeShellExecution

iterations.action: Diagnosed plan:gate looking for node.exe.json manifest path
Ran smoke:gates; fixed dev-log generator null pipeline crashes

tradeoffs: Agent push enforcement relies on Cursor hooks loading; user must reload IDE
Dev log HEAD check uses git log on file paths, not embedded json git.sha
improvements: npm run agent:push orchestrates dev log creation then push
npm run smoke:gates for regression testing both gates
risks: Projects with old study-docs/ paths need migration
Cursor Source Control push bypasses shell hook
followUps: Run smoke:gates in CI optional job
Consider hook or rule for plan:gate before tier-L implementation
